text.title: Claude Best Practices Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract for the policy pack: model-tier table, fallback logging on/off, shared rate bucket, cache layout, retry-after parsing.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)
section.code: { "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#", "type": "object", "title": "claude-best-practices-output", "required": [ "model_tier_table", "fallback_logging", "shared_rate_bucket", "cache_layout", "retry_after_parsing", "forbidden_seen" ], "properties": { "model_tier_table": {"description": "Object {routing, generation, reasoning} all full-date model ids."}, "fallback_logging": {"description": "Boolean — response.model logged on every call."}, "shared_rate_bucket": {"description": "Boolean — multi-worker pool uses a shared token bucket."}, "cache_layout": {"description": "Object {stable_prefix_first: bool, cached_prefix_tokens: int>=1024}."}, "retry_after_parsing": {"description": "Boolean — retry-after header parsed instead of guessing."}, "batch_api_enabled": {"description": "Boolean — Batch API used where workload allows."}, "forbidden_seen": {"description": "Forbidden patterns matched; must be empty."} } }

required.field: routing / generation / reasoning all pinned with full-date ids.
Forbidden patterns matched; must be empty.
Batch API used where workload allows.

forbidden.pattern: Any model id in `model_tier_table` without full-date suffix.

example.note: All forbidden patterns absent; tier table fully pinned.
Every forbidden pattern triggered — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
